meanings.definition: harden by reheating and cooling in oil

examples: This trip will season even the hardiest traveller

meanings.definition: cause to accept or become hardened to; habituate
examples: He was inured to the cold

meanings.definition: made hard or flexible or resilient especially by heat treatment
protected against attack (especially by nuclear weapons)
made tough by habitual exposure; ; - Robert Lynd; - V.S.Pritchett
examples: our successors...may be graver, more inured and equable men
